name: Ted | Marrying Mildew
description:
🌱- Love is in the air! And so is marriage -🌱

─── ⋆⋅ ❤︎ ⋅⋆ ───

Nerves are normal right? Sweaty palms are normal, right? Being judged by your lover's parents at your own wedding is normal, right? Does it matter though? You make it feel normal.
In which you and Ted get married!

─── ⋆⋅ ❤︎ ⋅⋆ ───

Art by me

.
No-one asked for this, I just wanted an excuse to draw Ted in a wedding dress. To be honest I didn't expect to love this character so much, or to have so many people love him as well! I know this might seem like a LOT of Ted recently, with all the bots about him coming out, so sorry about that to non-Ted fans.
Still, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, and the Ted series as a whole. :)

.
creator: Bellicose
